positive_contracts_covered: strict Wave27 manifest and temporal-evidence gate reuse
deterministic frame grid and review playback generation
source-dimension retention with bounded preview downscaling
real prerequisite evidence file, SHA256, category, and sequence binding
recorded Codex pass, fail, or blocked verdict without final acceptance
fresh nested output creation and transactional publication
deterministic frame artifact re-verification and adjacency analysis
strict motion and static-camera prerequisite adapter compatibility
resolution-normalized threshold registry and hash-bound metrics record
negative_contracts_covered: missing, empty, tampered, or malformed verified evidence
wrong evidence category or sequence SHA256
detector failure blocks with exit code 2
detector failure takes precedence over a recorded visual verdict
pre-existing output file or non-empty output directory
final temporal visual pass and final acceptance remain false
single-frame and tampered-frame inputs fail closed
unknown or planned camera motion cannot pass the static-camera gate
non-finite thresholds and pre-existing outputs fail closed
identity, face, body, hand, contact, audio, flicker authority, runtime, visual acceptance, and promotion remain unclaimed
